text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Flower, about your homework. You made a few
tiny but noticeable mistakes.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
I know it's tough since you skipped grades, but
let's do our best together, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah! I'll do better next time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I haven't been doing well in my studies or races
lately. I've really gotta improve...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I made it all the way to Tracen Academy, so I
have to live up to its standards...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (...How can I become more like a grown-up?)
Guess who!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Eek?! I-I know that voice... Sky?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... don't you have joint training this period?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Meh, figured I'd skip out. I'm in the mood to go
fishing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And it's no fun to go alone. Sooo, if you're free,
wanna come with?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What? Right now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ahh, nothing beats fishing in the mountains! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... We haven't caught anything at all yet. Is
that okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If we want to land a big catch, wouldn't it be
better to change locations? Or maybe the bait?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's the hurry? Waiting for a bite is part of the
fun.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Worry too much about results and you'll just
exhaust yourself.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I prefer doing things at my own pace. I wanna
enjoy myself, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: (Her own pace... Maybe I can try that too...)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! I-I think I've got a bite!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okey-doke, now stay calm. Once I give the sign,
pull on the rod! Aaand—pull!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I caught it... Hehe. It's so tiny and cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
See? It doesn't need to be a big catch for you to
have fun, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In light of Nishino Flower's recent improvement in
both her studies and races, I ask her about the
source of her success.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So... I'm only repeating what someone else said,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The key is to take things at your own pace, and
to enjoy what you do! ♪
